ast.name: appendText
ast.source: OFF — listed folders are excluded from review.
ast.target: 关闭 — 列出的文件夹将被排除在复习之外。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Shows per-file review indicator (last review date / due / not reviewed) for the active note.
ast.target: 为当前笔记显示每个文件的复习指示器（上次复习日期 / 到期 / 未复习）。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: NOTE: Restart Obsidian after toggling for changes to apply.
ast.target: 注意：切换后请重启 Obsidian 以使更改生效。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Shows total count of notes due for review across vault, next to the current-note indicator.
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示整个知识库内到期复习的笔记总数，位于当前笔记指示器旁边。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 标记为已复习失败：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default number of days between reviews for all notes.
ast.target: 所有笔记的默认复习间隔天数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: One path per line, relative to vault root.
ast.target: 每行一个路径，相对于知识库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Custom review intervals per folder. Format: "folder/path,days" — one rule per line. Uses longest matching path when rules overlap. Example: Daily Notes,90
ast.target: 按文件夹自定义复习间隔。格式：\"文件夹/路径,天数\" — 每行一条规则。当规则重叠时，使用最长匹配路径。示例：Daily Notes,90

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter field for per-file interval override. Set to a number (days) or "never" to exclude.
ast.target: 用于覆盖单个文件复习间隔的 Frontmatter 字段。设置为数字（天数）或 \"never\" 以排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Frontmatter field where the last review date is stored.
ast.target: 存储上次复习日期的 Frontmatter 字段。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 全局复习间隔

ast.target: 排除 / 包含的文件夹

ast.target: 文件夹特定间隔
